title: selenicereus anthonyanus
intro: Selenicereus anthonyanus, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus or Queen of the Night, is a species of cactus native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selenicereus anthonyanus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its stems and flowers, which can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
